themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "Verse 16 introduces the plague of lice or gnats (כִּנִּם, kinnim), targeting Geb, earth god....". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶ֥רֶץ: of the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".
